purpose: Summarize post-shadow-freeze ContraMamba status and identify the next core/generalization bottleneck.
unresolved_core_questions: What is the current best clean/dev architecture after the shadow diagnostic sequence?
Which external/generalization failure mode is now dominant after location and route/order diagnostics?
Is the main bottleneck still false SUPPORT, false NOT_ENTITLED, support recall, external fact-verification transfer, or prefix/artifact sensitivity?
Does vNext routing/entitlement need architecture-level modification rather than more rule diagnostics?
Which scalar exports best explain current external errors?

external_fact_verification_transfer.reason: Earlier external VitaminC/Climate-FEVER diagnostics remained weak relative to clean/dev despite later shadow diagnostics.

entitlement_calibration.reason: Core ContraMamba goal depends on learned entitlement/compositional sufficiency rather than external rule overrides.

support_recall_vs_false_support_tradeoff.reason: Several stages show tension between suppressing false SUPPORT and preserving correct SUPPORT.

prefix_artifact_and_core_localization.reason: Stage120-122 explored prefix/core localization; may need consolidation before new architecture changes.

implicit_temporal_or_route_semantics.reason: Would require broader semantic parsing and negative controls; not current priority.

recommended_stage155.goal: Run or synthesize a post-freeze core error inventory over the current best prediction exports.
recommended_stage155.recommended_default: Create a post-freeze core error taxonomy that excludes shadow-rule integration and identifies the dominant remaining model-internal failure mode.
must_not_do: do not integrate shadow diagnostics into final predictions
do not train on external data
do not tune thresholds on external labels
do not reopen route/order expansion unless evidence shows it is dominant
candidate_outputs: recommendation for next architecture or evaluation stage

interpretation.project_state: shadow diagnostics stabilized; core/generalization work should resume
interpretation.final_model_direction: model-internal structured judgment, not deterministic prediction override
